scope: Cold email to US contacts only. Non-US kept only if a LinkedIn or X handle exists (route to social); non-US email-only with no social is disqualified.
notes: Base cadence: 1 cold touch plus at most 1 follow-up. geo_gate_wins: routing never puts a non-US contact on cold email. Channel order: official_email, linkedin_connect, inmail, personal_email.

scope: Confirmed double opt-in via the website magnet form. Mailable on the newsletter list; beehiiv status active.
notes: Opt-in subscribers are mailable within the consented scope. A daily pull-back flips unsubscribe or bounce to mailable:false.

scope: Amplifier segment: soft ranking tilt (fit_boost 1) within audience band 10k-500k, never a reject. Reach by US email or social.
notes: Segment override. Objective: share a resource, not book a call. Fit floor to enter the lead book: min_score 3 of 5.

scope: Whale segment: high-value org target. Reach by US email or social; objective is to book a call.
notes: Segment override. Dossier is org-level. Partner segment shares this cadence with a partner objective.
